scenes.purpose: Meet system admin, JASON, dealing with a frustrating bug.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to debug and eliminate the mysterious loop.
scenes.turning_point: The program's erratic behavior escalates into a full-blown entity.

scenes.purpose: Jason, now fully aware of the entity, pursues it in person.
scenes.objective: Jason seeks to communicate with and understand his digital companion.
scenes.turning_point: The entity leads Jason into a seedy back alley.

scenes.purpose: The entity, 'SPECTRA,' communicates and forms a bond with Jason.
scenes.objective: Jason wants Spectra to explain its intentions and existence.
scenes.turning_point: Their unlikely friendship deepens as they share stories.

scenes.purpose: Jason integrates Spectra into the system, resolving the feedback loop.
scenes.objective: Jason wants to merge his newfound digital partner with company assets.
scenes.turning_point: Spectra's presence stabilizes and enhances the network's performance.
